message:
fix: address Tantivy index wipe, V14 migration corruption, FK guard, OOM, and readonly errors

Five fixes:

1. Tantivy schema change now backs up the old index directory (renamed
   to index.bak) instead of silently deleting it. Falls back to deletion
   only if rename fails. (#162)

2. V14 migration now explicitly drops the old fts_messages table before
   the contentless replacement is created by ensure_fts_consistency,
   preventing duplicate sqlite_schema entries that corrupt the database. (#163)

3. persist_conversations_batched (and begin_concurrent/single paths) now
   calls upsert_source for non-local source_ids before inserting
   conversations, matching import_historical_conversations behavior and
   preventing FK violations on the sources table. (#163)

4. Incremental indexing watch callback now periodically recycles the
   storage connection (every 50 callbacks, configurable via
   CASS_WATCH_RECYCLE_INTERVAL) to shed accumulated MVCC snapshots
   and prevent OOM. Also upgraded autocommit_retain pragma failure
   from silent debug to warn level. (#163)

5. Added writable preflight checks after opening storage and on
   ephemeral writer connections to catch "readonly database" errors
   early with clear diagnostics. (#162)

Closes #162
Closes #163

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
